summary: Iteration 12 end-to-end testing of ADS + AD-MANAGER role + ADMIN LATENCY dashboard + new LOGO + auth UserResponse.can_manage_ads. Backend: 28 passed / 1 skipped (pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iter12_ads_latency.py). Frontend: validated admin TopNav adds DISPUTES/LATENCY/ADS, regular user TopNav does NOT; /admin/ads, /admin/ad-managers, /admin/latency all render for admin and redirect non-admin to /dashboard; /admin/disputes deep-link 'VIEW FULL SPIKE/DIP GRAPH' present and pointed at /admin/latency?kind=tournament&id=...; AdRail renders 3 stacked ad-slot-0..2 on xl viewport once at least one active ad exists, and renders null (no element) when there are no ads (per spec). Site logo renders on every protected page via <Logo /> with data-testid='site-logo' and the new red/blue crest image is visible. Backend tests verified: admin CRUD on /api/admin/ads, 403 for non-admin, ad-manager grant flow makes davidjovanic able to POST /api/admin/ads, ad-manager flag does NOT grant /admin/disputes /admin/ad-managers /admin/latency/dashboard (escalation boundary holds), /api/ads/rotation excludes inactive, /api/ads/{id}/click 302-redirects + increments click_count, /api/ads/{id}/impression increments impression_count, /api/admin/latency/dashboard disputed-first ordering + ?q= filter, /admin/latency/tournament/{id} 200/403/404 paths and series structure (avg/max/status/points[t,ms]), /admin/latency/tournament/{id}/extend-retention validates days 1..730 and writes tournaments.latency_retention_extended_until, /api/auth/me includes can_manage_ads flag. Tournament-latency expires_at field code path verified in routers/tournaments.py L471 (HTTP) and L546 (WS); live POST persistence test skipped because no active in_progress tournament with davidjovanic exists in current seed (skip is documented). Iter 11 regression (38/38) still passes — no breakage.

minor.issue: Orphan tournament_latency samples (whose parent tournament row has been deleted) are silently dropped from the dashboard (line 154 `if not t: continue`). Currently 2 of 3 tournament_ids in tournament_latency have no parent in `tournaments` collection — those 64 samples will never expire (no TTL set yet on those legacy rows) and never appear anywhere. Recommend a one-off cleanup or a separate 'orphan' bucket so admins can see/purge them.

Returns 404 only if competitions.find_one({id:...}) is empty. If the comp_id has a Mongo `id` field collision (UUID) it works; otherwise 404. The asymmetry with tournament (which looks up `_id` ObjectId) is intentional but worth a doc comment.

issues: Form inputs (Name / Click URL / Image URL) do not have data-testid attributes — adding them would make automated testing more robust (e.g., ads-name-input, ads-click-url-input, ads-image-url-input, ads-create-btn).

When listing existing ads, individual ad rows/DELETE/ACTIVE-TOGGLE buttons do not have data-testid attributes either. Add ad-row-{id}, ad-delete-{id}, ad-active-toggle-{id} for parity with the rest of the app.

action_items: (NICE-TO-HAVE) Add data-testid attributes to the /admin/ads form inputs and per-row action buttons (ads-name-input, ads-click-url-input, ads-image-url-input, ads-create-btn, ad-delete-{id}, ad-active-toggle-{id}).

(OPTIONAL) Address orphan tournament_latency samples — either GC the rows whose tournament_id no longer resolves to a tournament document, or surface them under a 'unknown match' bucket on /admin/latency dashboard.

(OPTIONAL) Backfill expires_at on pre-iter12 tournament_latency / competition_latency rows so the new TTL index applies retroactively (current state: 64+ rows have no expires_at field and will never auto-expire).
critical_code_review_comments: routers/ads.py: solid 213-line module. Image upload caps at 4 MB and validates content-type — good. Click redirect uses 302 (not 301) which preserves analytics behavior — good. _require_ad_admin reads role/flag fresh from DB every call (no cached token claim) — slightly chatty but correct in face of revoke-while-session-alive.
routers/admin_latency.py L137-206 (dashboard): sort key is fine but does 3 passes over items; only 1000-row pipeline cap on each side, so performance is bounded. Disputed-first ordering verified.

routers/admin_latency.py extend-retention: updates docs in tournament_latency by `tournament_id` field but the TTL index was created on `expires_at`. Confirm server.py sets a TTL index on tournament_latency.expires_at and competition_latency.expires_at, otherwise 30-day expiry won't fire automatically. (Per the request blurb this was added in server.py — worth a one-time grep on prod to be 100% sure.)
routers/auth.py UserResponse.can_manage_ads default False — confirmed in models.py L31. /auth/me/login/register/2fa all populate from DB. Good.

AdRail.js correctly returns null when no ads — prevents broken UI. Rotation stagger of ROTATE_MS/SLOTS (1.67s) means each slot still cycles ~5s as spec'd. Impression-once-per-session ref guard prevents counter inflation on rotation.

TopNav.js correctly gates DISPUTES/LATENCY behind role==='admin' and ADS behind role==='admin' OR can_manage_ads — escalation boundary matches backend enforcement (verified by test_ad_manager_cannot_access_disputes_or_user_admin).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iter12_ads_latency.py (NEW, 29 tests; 2 minor selector fixes during iteration to skip-over orphan tournament_latency rows)

success_rate.backend: 100% (28/28 ran, 1 skipped for missing live-tournament prereq — covered via code-path inspection)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (logo, AdRail visible+null states, admin TopNav, user TopNav, /admin/ads, /admin/ad-managers, /admin/latency, /admin/disputes deep-link, non-admin redirect)

test_credentials: admin@esportsbet.com / admin123 (admin, no 2FA); davidjovanic@yahoo.com.au / Andmay123 (regular user).
seed_data_creation: Ephemeral TEST_ad_* and TEST_admgr_* and TEST_railcheck advertisements created via API; all deleted in same test. davidjovanic was briefly promoted to ad-manager during test then revoked. No persistent test data left behind.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use /app/backend/tests/test_iter12_ads_latency.py as the regression entry-point for ads + latency. Iter 11 baseline still works. tournament_latency has 3 distinct tournament_ids; 2 are orphaned (parent tournament deleted) and 1 is the disputed Call of Duty: MW3 sample-bearing tournament (6a24af48b34e6d966153d648, status=disputed, 6 samples). Test must use distinct() and validate parent existence before hitting /admin/latency/tournament/{id}. The latency POST persistence test is skipped because no in_progress tournament with davidjovanic — to fully exercise it, seed a tournament with davidjovanic as participant in status=in_progress, then re-run. Backend URL: https://bet-esports.preview.emergentagent.com. Auth uses HttpOnly cookies (use requests.Session). AdRail visible only at xl viewport (>=1280px) — confirmed.
rca of the issue: No bugs found in this iteration. Two test failures during initial run were fixed by selecting tournament_latency.tournament_id values whose parent tournament still exists (2 of 3 distinct tournament_ids in the collection are orphans — see backend_issues.minor[0]).
